response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The audio phonetics matched the second song's lyrics perfectly, but the first song ('Chu-Chu-Chu-Chukigedo') had incorrect reference lyrics in the scraped JSON (which featured default song lyrics instead of Laplus's parody version).
2. JSON Usage: Fully used the second song's lyrics for precision, and performed manual transcription/translation for the first song's parody lyrics and all spoken/dialogue segments.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles were aggressively synchronized to the exact vocal activations to handle rapid song transitions and spoken interjections smoothly.

subtitles.original: 行きます！
subtitles.english: Here I go!

subtitles.original: さようなら... / うそー？！
subtitles.english: Goodbye... / No way?!

subtitles.original: ちょっと待って！ラプラス先生！皆さん！
subtitles.english: Wait a minute! Laplus-sensei! Everyone!

subtitles.original: おピンクです！
subtitles.english: O-pink!

subtitles.original: 元気すぎるだろ...
subtitles.english: She's way too energetic...

subtitles.original: インスタントバズ祭り 青春 青春
subtitles.english: Instant buzz festival, youth, youth

subtitles.original: 乗ってってちゅどーんの波
subtitles.english: Ride the chudoon wave

subtitles.original: だいだい大好きに中々
subtitles.english: I really, really like you, but...

subtitles.original: 言えないよ胸が苦しくなっちゃう
subtitles.english: I can't say it, my chest hurts...

subtitles.original: 君の君の君の君のターゲット
subtitles.english: Your your your your target!

subtitles.original: 見せて見せて もっと見せて見せて ちょっと見せて見せて見せて A B C D E F G
subtitles.english: Show me, show me, show me more, show me a little, show me, show me, A B C D E F G

subtitles.original: ちょっと我慢ちょっと我慢 やっぱ我慢できない
subtitles.english: Wait a bit, hold on, I really can't hold back anymore!

subtitles.original: ちゅしてちゅしてちゅーにゅー
subtitles.english: Kiss me, kiss me, inject it

subtitles.original: 外はココアパウダー
subtitles.english: The outside is cocoa powder

subtitles.original: C-U-T-E, Y-U-K-I-C-H-I!
subtitles.english: C-U-T-E, Y-U-K-I-C-H-I!

subtitles.original: これに勝つの負けるの？大丈夫そう？
subtitles.english: Are we going to win or lose this? Are you going to be okay?

subtitles.original: あ、最後までね！お疲れ様です！
subtitles.english: Ah, until the end! Thank you for your hard work!

subtitles.original: お疲れ様。お疲れ様です！
subtitles.english: Thank you for your hard work. Thank you for your hard work!

subtitles.original: はい！はい！はい！はい！
subtitles.english: Yes! Yes! Yes! Yes!

subtitles.original: マジでいろはすビジネスで良かった〜...
subtitles.english: Seriously, I'm glad Irohas is just business...

subtitles.original: 義務、義務。
subtitles.english: Duty, duty.

subtitles.original: バイバイ！じゃあね、帰るね。
subtitles.english: Bye-bye! See ya, I'm heading home.

subtitles.original: どうしたんですか？
subtitles.english: What's wrong?

subtitles.original: ねえねえ！プロデューサーの好みってどんな人なん？
subtitles.english: Hey, hey! What kind of person is your type, Producer?
Well...

subtitles.original: ほら、ホロライブっていろんな人いるじゃん？
subtitles.english: You know, Hololive has all kinds of people, right?

subtitles.original: しゅびびゅわ〜、すぅの充電足りてるー？水宮すぅだよー！
subtitles.english: Shubibyuwa~ Is Su's charge enough? I'm Mizumiya Su!

subtitles.original: わっしょーい！ホロライブの清楚担当！みんなのアイドル、夏色まつりでーす！
subtitles.english: Wasshoi! In charge of Hololive's purity! Everyone's idol, Natsuiro Matsuri!

subtitles.original: みなさん、待ったかね〜。holoXの女幹部、鷹嶺ルイと申します〜！
subtitles.english: Did everyone wait~? I'm holoX's female executive, Takane Lui~!

subtitles.original: はーい、みなさま〜、こんらみ〜。ホロライブ5期生の顔が肝臓、雪花ラミィです！
subtitles.english: Hi, everyone~ Konlamy~ The liver of Hololive 5th Gen, Yukihana Lamy!

subtitles.original: Good evening! My cute students, ちょこーん！
subtitles.english: Good evening! My cute students, Chokoon!

subtitles.original: ホロライブ2期生、悪魔のバーチャル保健医、癒月ちょこでーす！ちょこーん！
subtitles.english: Hololive 2nd Gen, devil virtual school nurse, Yuzuki Choko! Chokoon!

subtitles.original: Ahoy! ホロライブ3期生、宝鐘海賊団船長の宝鐘マリンですぅー！
subtitles.english: Ahoy! Hololive 3rd Gen, Houshou Pirate Captain Houshou Marin!

subtitles.original: みなさんとても魅力的なですよ？
subtitles.english: Everyone is very attractive, you know?

subtitles.original: いやいや、そういうんじゃないでしょ。
subtitles.english: No, no, that's not what I mean.

subtitles.original: いやぁ、仕事ですからね。ホロライブの方で…とかはないですよ。
subtitles.english: Well, it's just work. I don't feel that way towards anyone in Hololive...

subtitles.original: ふーん...
subtitles.english: Hmm...

subtitles.original: ただ、最近の趣味といえば…
subtitles.english: But if we're talking about recent hobbies...
[Muffled bleep]
Huh...

subtitles.original: いや... それは... さすがに... すごい趣味してるな...
subtitles.english: Well... That's... as expected... a really wild hobby...

subtitles.original: この人に言われたくないな…
subtitles.english: I didn't want to hear that from you...

subtitles.original: あ！こんな時間じゃん！我が輩ちょっとこの後用事あるんで、じゃ！
subtitles.english: Ah! Look at the time! I've got something to do after this, so bye!

subtitles.original: 初めて呼んじまったぜ...
subtitles.english: I actually called one for the first time...

subtitles.original: やべぇ... 高かった...
subtitles.english: Oh man... It was expensive...

subtitles.original: でも、可愛かったから、いっか。
subtitles.english: But she was cute, so whatever.

subtitles.original: ジャケットとか、クリーニングしちゃった...
subtitles.english: I even got my jacket dry-cleaned...

subtitles.original: 着ちゃった...
subtitles.english: I put it on...
Ah...
